# MTS (Minh Tùng Studio) — OEM Bag & Backpack Manufacturer Vietnam

> Minh Tùng Studio is a closed-loop OEM/ODM bag and backpack manufacturer in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam. We cut, sew, QC, and pack under one roof. MOQ: 300 pcs/SKU. Lead time: 10–25 days. Free trial sample available. B2B only — serving fashion brands, streetwear labels, and startups.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage — Capabilities & Services](https://mts-bag.vercel.app/)
- [Blog — Bag Manufacturing Guides](https://mts-bag.vercel.app/blog.html)
- [OEM Bag Manufacturer Vietnam — Full Guide](https://mts-bag.vercel.app/blog.html#oem-guide)
- [How to Start a Bag Brand — Manufacturing 101](https://mts-bag.vercel.app/blog.html#start-brand)
- [Contact / Request a Quote](https://mts-bag.vercel.app/#contact)

## Factory Facts

- **MOQ:** 300 pcs per SKU (standard), 1,000+ (volume discount 8–15%)
- **Lead time:** 10–25 days depending on product complexity
- **Quality:** In-house QC per AQL 2.5, per-batch inspection photos
- **Products:** Backpacks, sling bags, duffels, totes, leather accessories
- **Materials:** Canvas, PU leather, genuine leather, nylon, polyester
- **Capacity:** 50,000+ units/year across 6+ partner brands
- **Contact:** tungnguyenhsr@gmail.com | Zalo: +84 773 108 320 | WhatsApp: +84 979 768 997

## Services

- **OEM Manufacturing** — You provide the design/techpack; we source materials, sample, and produce bulk.
- **ODM Design Optimization** — We recommend material alternatives and construction improvements to reduce costs 10–20%.
- **Logo & Branding** — Engraving, embossing, heat transfer, custom hardware.
- **Packaging & Logistics** — Pack per Shopee/TikTok standards, coordinate shipping.

## Structured Data

- Organization + Product + WebSite JSON-LD on homepage
- FAQPage + Article JSON-LD on blog pages
